name: The Foggy Dog Onyx Waxed Canvas Dog Waste Bag Holder
description: Pick up after your paw-tner in style with The Foggy Dog Onyx Waxed Canvas Dog Waste Bag Holder! This chic piece features black waxed canvas, and a gold zipper and clip for an eye-catching finish. Plus, the clip allows you to easily attach the bag to the O-ring on your leash!
